title: Create Bionics: Simplified
description: A resource pack that aims to remove all the non-vanilla friendly detail elements in the Create Bionics mobs.
body:
Not a fan of Create Bionics' over complicated designs? Here's a resource pack that removes unnecessary details.
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b359b5409dac43bcda85d61417de039dd237817b.png)
